5-time-award-winning.title: 5-Time Award-Winning: Earasers!
5-time-award-winning.excerpt: For the fifth year in a row, MusicRadar has named Earasers the best music earplugs on the market.

trusted-by-djs.title: Earasers Trusted by the World's Top DJs
trusted-by-djs.excerpt: From festival main stages to intimate club nights, professional DJs rely on Earasers to protect their most important tool.

dijkman-amsterdam.title: Now Available at Dijkman Music Amsterdam
dijkman-amsterdam.excerpt: You can now try and buy Earasers in-store at Dijkman Music, one of the Netherlands' most respected music stores.

hearing-damage-explained.title: How Noise-Induced Hearing Loss Actually Works
hearing-damage-explained.excerpt: Sound is vibration. Too much of it, for too long, and the tiny hair cells in your cochlea start dying permanently.
